issues.description: OnPlay effect missing SearchDeck parameters: should specify looking at 5 cards from top, filtering for {ODYSSEY} type (not [Lim]), revealing up to 1, and placing rest at bottom in any order. Current DSL has no filter logic.

Second effect completely wrong: trigger is 'Activated' but text states '[End of Your Turn]' which should be 'EndOfTurn' with duration 'DuringYourTurn'. Action should be setting character as active (likely Rest=false or Active state), not Rest. Condition should check 'HasRestingDon' or character count, not 'Always'.
Missing duration 'DuringYourTurn' for end-of-turn effect that references 'your turn'.
